method: Direct read-only navigation to /search/results/people/ and /search/results/content/ + accessibility/DOM extraction. First results page per query. No profile-by-profile activity opening (conservative pace).

people_queries.note: strong BW technischer-Vertrieb hits (Erboral, Wolters/RHV, Ritter/Schnaithmann, Dietsche/IAR, Meyer/IRCO)
Projektierung/Technische Leiter (Habicht, Braun, Gläser/MTS, Dangel/Liebherr, Pitzner/Hohner, Näckel-Birkenfeld/Titan)
Hobt/FORM+TEST, Kramer/Amtec Kistler, Breu/ASS, Albert/ASYS, Schmidt/VS
mixed; Bloms, Klenk/Busch; some off-topic dropped
GF density (Schmidt/VS, Noll, Bau, Haider/HKR, Freigassner/HAGE, Schreyer)

post_queries.note: surfaced dima (Fertigungswissen im Angebotsprozess), Westermeier, Spanflug, Perspectix, camos, ANGER MACHINING
mostly consultants/coaches (Maier, Klippe, Müller) + recruiter (Lubka) -> down-prioritized
EOL - End of Line Packaging Experts GmbH
HuW Automation, VIETZ (Juri Weimer), + off-topic (MEDICA, LinkedIn)
Schepers (100K+ Konfigurationen/Jahr), Weßing (Maschinenbau+KI), + several generic-AI creators dropped

extraction_notes.people_cards: role=listitem / li containing a[href*='/in/']; name + connection degree + headline (company often in headline).
extraction_notes.content_cards: content search did NOT expose data-urn or standard date nodes; authors extracted via /in/ and /company/ links; only Prewa's canonical activity permalink is known (from the company posts feed, not content search).

limitations: Per-profile 30/60/90-day activity is 'unknown' for role-search profiles (not opened).
Company affiliation and location taken from visible headline text; confirm on profile before outreach.
No emails/phones/Contact Info collected. No sensitive attributes inferred.
